name: @ever-works/postgres-db-plugin
description: PostgreSQL database backend for Ever Works — gives deployed Works a database (the managed Ever Works DB or a custom server), one database per Work.

plugin.name: PostgreSQL DB
plugin.description: Gives your deployed Works a PostgreSQL database — the managed Ever Works DB or your own server. One database is provisioned per Work on the same server.

envVars.name: DB_EVER_WORKS_SHARED_ENABLED
envVars.description: Enable the managed 'Ever Works DB' option (a shared Postgres cluster the platform runs).

envVars.name: DB_EVER_WORKS_SHARED_ADMIN_URL
envVars.description: Least-privilege provisioner connection (CREATEDB+CREATEROLE) on the Ever Works DB cluster. DDL only; direct/session endpoint.

envVars.name: DB_EVER_WORKS_SHARED_HOST
envVars.description: Host used to compose the per-Work DATABASE_URL injected into the deployed site.

envVars.name: DB_EVER_WORKS_SHARED_PORT
envVars.description: Port for the composed per-Work DATABASE_URL (default 5432).

envVars.name: DB_EVER_WORKS_SHARED_SSLMODE
envVars.description: sslmode for the composed per-Work DATABASE_URL (default require).
